title: The RealReal Inc (REAL) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Strategic Initiatives
text: The RealReal announced Q2 2025 revenue of $165 million, up 14% year-over-year, with a net loss of $11 million improved $5 million year-over-year, and adjusted EBITDA of $6.8 million improved $8.6 million year-over-year. The company achieved record high quarterly gross merchandise value and total revenue. Consignment revenue grew 14% compared to the prior year period, and direct revenue grew 23% year-over-year in the second quarter. Gross margin of 74.3% improved 20 basis points compared to the same period in 2024. Second quarter adjusted EBITDA margin was 4.1%, an increase of 530 basis points versus the prior year period. Trailing twelve months active buyers was 1,001,000, an increase of 6% compared to the same period in 2024. The RealReal raised its full-year 2025 guidance, now projecting total revenue of $667–$674 million and adjusted EBITDA of $29–$32 million. The company emphasized strategic focus on expanding supply through retail locations and brand partnerships, enhancing customer experience through improved discovery and curation, and achieving operational excellence through technology investments including Athena AI automation.
